name: Filesec.io
description: Catalog of malicious file extensions, risks, OS-level mitigations Tool: https://filesec.io. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #1080 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Filesec.io output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
